name: openclaw
limitations: CLI render is supported; native installer and hooks are under follow-up work.
Bundle metadata is emitted as generated import bundle metadata in targetRender.openclaw.payload; native OpenClaw installer behavior is not claimed.
Current non-CLI support is a generated import bundle, not a native marketplace installer.

bundle.importInstructions: Use the release bundle at bundles/openclaw/<pack>/ and import the included role, skill, lifecycle, and task files into the host workflow.
